build-error-resolver.use_when: Any build or type error occurs
build-error-resolver.never_use: For refactoring, architecture changes, or adding features
build-error-resolver.priority: CRITICAL - Use INSTEAD of Explore for build issues

database-reviewer.use_when: Any database work - schema, queries, migrations
database-reviewer.priority: CRITICAL - Use INSTEAD of Explore for database work
database-reviewer.companion_skill: supabase-postgres-best-practices — invoke for Postgres optimization patterns

security-reviewer.use_when: Before deployment, when handling auth or user input

code-simplifier.use_when: Improving code clarity and consistency while preserving functionality

doc-updater.use_when: ONLY when explicitly requested to update documentation

priority_order: 1. Check if a specific skill handles the task
2. Check if a specialized agent matches the task type
3. If agent has availability: project-specific and is not found, use its fallback_to agent
4. Use generic exploration ONLY when no specialized tool exists
routing_rules.fallback_convention: Agents marked availability: project-specific may live in project codebases. When unavailable locally, use the fallback_to agent instead.
routing_rules.model_policy: User agents (build-error-resolver, database-reviewer, security-reviewer, tdd-guide, e2e-runner, doc-updater) use model: opus intentionally for quality. Plugin agents may use sonnet/inherit — this divergence is expected.
